breakdown: Refactors rewards box numeric extraction to use centralized robust conversion with fallback chains for LLM hallucinated fields. Introduces _get_raw() helper that handles empty strings, zeros, NaN/inf gracefully before calling convert_value(). Strong test coverage with unit and E2E tests validates edge cases. Main weaknesses: _DNC abbreviation is opaque (should be DefensiveNumericConverter), _get_raw returns Any type reducing type safety, and no public function docstrings.
key_changes: Replace multiple coerce_int calls with centralized _DNC.convert_value() for xp_gained, gold, current_xp, next_level_xp
Add _get_raw() helper with fallback chain that skips empty strings, zeros, and non-finite floats until finite non-zero value found
Test empty_primary_fallback and nan_primary_fallback edge cases with fallback aliases
Add rewards_box_robustness.py test file with internal unit tests and E2E hallucination provocation
Add WHY comment about LLM boolean representation handling
